title: Amtech B2200 250mm (10") Tin Cutter/tin Snips
features: SAFE TO USE: This 250mm (10") tin cutter has an integral safety catch and enables fast, effortless cutting of thin metal
DURABLE: Made from drop forged, the cable cutter is made from heat-treated steel for increased durability
PRACTICAL SIZE: 250mm length provides reach and stability.
PRECISION CONTROL: Easy to handle with good balance for accurate work.
COMPACT DESIGN: BACKED BY AMTECH S Backed by Amtech’s 3-year guarantee with UK-based aftercare.
description: Product Description Am-Tech 10-inch tin cutter. Made from drop forged, heat treated steel. With safety catch. Spring loaded. Display packed.Am Tech provides a 12 Month guarantee on all their products. Am Tech only use the best materials in their products to provide a product that meets your expectations Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Cutter See more
